title: Block Diagram
excerpt:
i was speniding the last hour to find a simple way to create a block diagram, however i could not find any solution… 
anyone can assist to explain why we cannot simply build block diagram boards with connections?

posts.author: TsachiD (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:
i was speniding the last hour to find a simple way to create a block diagram, however i could not find any solution…
anyone can assist to explain why we cannot simply build block diagram boards with connections?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a fairly new monday product called Work Canvas that may fit your needs (I use it for Solution Design) - you can use it for free! Check it out here → https://www.workcanvas.com/

Bruce Gosk | bruce@mintconsulting.org

posts.author: TsachiD (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:

Is there any way to connect the blocks in the diagram to the Monday board with tasks and other boards’ functions?

This will be amazing!

I will appreciate your reply

Thanks

Tsachi

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: TsachiD (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bruce
Many thanks for your email reply

  1. Can we integrate the Work canvas into Monday boards and connect it to the team, or is it a separate solution?

Tsachi

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried using tools like Draw. io or Lucidchart? They make block diagram creation simple and might work for your needs!

posts.author: TsachiD (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Pls check your organization and update all your support team that Monday has a great tool by the name: workcanvas.com

This is Monday supported tool and your entire team must know it!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TsachiD, sorry for the late reply. Your comments didn’t tag me (I just went through liked comments and found this thread again). A quick google later - Work Canvas tutorial video - https://youtu.be/yWe2mdGFki4 also a lesson here monday academy | Skills, Training, Courses, Webinars & Certifications . There are new features/functionality added almost every month - I post the full releases on my LinkedIn (think I am the only one on there that actually does it too haha). Here are April’s full releases: #digitaltransformationau #mondaycrmforimpact #nonprofitefficiency | Bruce Gosk
